name: setBusinessAccountGiftSettings
description: Changes the privacy settings pertaining to incoming gifts in a managed business account. Requires the can_change_gift_settings business bot right

parameters.name: business_connection_id
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the business connection

parameters.name: show_gift_button
parameters.description: Pass True, if a button for sending a gift to the user or by the business account must always be shown in the input field

parameters.name: accepted_gift_types
parameters.description: Types of gifts accepted by the business account
